flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northeastern Technical College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $5.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Northeastern Technical College rose 55% between 2006 and 2009 (13.4% → 20.7%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northeastern Technical College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.9k → $6.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northeastern Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (62.6% → 70.2%).
